description_long: This kiosk features a modern, modular design with a prominent orange and white color scheme. The front panel is adorned with a large printed graphic, including a cartoon robot mascot, a smartphone image, and branding elements, as well as a large hand symbol. Integrated lighting fixtures are mounted above the main display area, illuminating the signage and workspace. The kiosk includes two rectangular side cabinets, a round table, and two high stools, suggesting a setup for customer interaction or product demonstration. The rear and side panels are plain white, providing a clean backdrop and concealing the interior structure. The materials appear to be primarily composite panels, likely with a metal or wood frame, and the surfaces are smooth and hard, suitable for high-traffic urban environments.
description: A modern orange and white kiosk with branded graphics, integrated lighting, side cabinets, and a customer interaction area with table and stools.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main orange panel with graphics, integrated lighting, side cabinets, and the round table with stools.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the curved front panel, lighting fixtures, and the arrangement of the table and stools.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain white back panels and the tops of the lighting fixtures, with no visible signage or interaction area.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the side of the kiosk, the edge of the main graphic panel, and the table and stools from a different perspective.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign and logo integrated into the front panel, with large graphics, branding, and a hand symbol; no digital or illuminated signage visible.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with slight curvature at the front, equipped with mounted lighting fixtures; no overhangs or decorative elements.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern, minimalist with bold branding and clean lines.
